item.content:encoded:
The Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup is on a mission to find and connect bitcoiners in the area and has been growing quickly.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: wmbm
item.content:encoded:
Who we are

Suggested text: Our website address is: https://westernmassbitcoin.com.

Comments

Suggested text: When visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection.

An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.

Media

Suggested text: If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website.

Cookies

Suggested text: If you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year.

If you visit our login page, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser.

When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select "Remember Me", your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed.

If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day.

Embedded content from other websites

Suggested text: Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.

These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.

Who we share your data with

Suggested text: If you request a password reset, your IP address will be included in the reset email.

How long we retain your data

Suggested text: If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue.

For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.

What rights you have over your data

Suggested text: If you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.

Where your data is sent

Suggested text: Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: wmbm
item.content:encoded:
Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup

The Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup is focused on providing bitcoin education, increasing adoption and just hanging out with bitcoiners.  We cover topics that are accessible to newcomers as well as to bitcoiners who are way down the rabbit hole but mostly we just want to meet people where they are at and explain why we believe bitcoin is changing everything.

Events

What we’re about

We meet once a month and all are welcome.  If you are new, we have members who can help you level up your knowledge related to self-custody, lightning, mining and many other areas.  If you are in or near Western Massachusetts, join us for a meetup or follow us on Twitter.

Twitter / X Nostr

Upcoming Events

Past Events

item.title: Subscribe
item.dc:creator: wmbm
item.content:encoded:
..

Subscribe

Follow our socials or drop your email in the form to stay informed about upcoming meetups!

Follow us on Nostr

Follow us on Twitter / X

If you'd like to contact us, reach out via email: WMBTCM@protonmail.com

..

Frequently asked questions

When is the next meetup?

All of our upcoming meetups are listed on our Events page

Can I come if I dont know anything about Bitcoin?

Yes! We cover material that is accessible to anyone, even if you are new to bitcoin. If you would like some additional information or just want to get in touch, email us at WMBTCM@protonmail.com

Do I have to RSVP?

We prefer to have an estimate of how many people will attend, and in some cases we may run up against a limit at the meetup location; for these reasons we prefer if you RSVP, or RSVP anonymously, but it is not required. 

Is there a cost to attend the meetups? No, it is free to join our meetups.

item.title: Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup #27
item.dc:creator: wmbm
item.content:encoded:
New Location for the Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup

We’re excited to announce that our next meetup will be at Peppa’s Pizza in East Longmeadow!

Event Details

For our 27th meetup we are going back to our Socratic Seminar format and we’ll cover news and other relevant topics in bitcoin. Thanks to Bitcoin Well we will also be having two free giveaways this month and one lucky attendee will win $25-$100 worth of bitcoin!

Agenda

The first 30 minutes will be for socializing (pizza and drinks available for purchase) then we will start with this month’s topic(s). This is a great opportunity to come and learn why bitcoin continues to grow and thrive no matter how many times it is declared dead by the incumbent financial class.

About the Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup

The Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup is on a mission to find and connect bitcoiners in the area and has been growing quickly. We are interested in spreading education, increasing local merchant adoption and hanging out with bitcoiners. We meet once a month and all are welcome to come and talk bitcoin. If you are new, we have members who can help you level up your knowledge related to self-custody, lightning, mining and many other areas.

Stay Connected

Follow us to join the conversation and vote on future dates and locations:

  • Twitter: @MassBitcoin
  • Nostr: snort.social
See You There!

Don’t miss out—this is a great opportunity to connect, learn, and grow with the Bitcoin community!
item.category: Peppas by The Slice , East Longmeadow, MA

item.title: Western Mass Bitcoin Hangout #28
item.dc:creator: wmbm
item.content:encoded:
Details

For our 28th meetup, we will be having a social meetup have a reserved space at Fitzwilly's in Northampton. Thanks to Bitcoin Well we will also be having two free giveaways this month and one lucky attendee will win $25-$100 worth of bitcoin!

This event is a great opportunity to meet other bitcoiners in our area and potentially get some free sats!

The Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup is on a mission to find and connect bitcoiners in the area and has been growing quickly. We are interested in spreading education, increasing local merchant adoption and hanging out with bitcoiners. We meet monthly on Sundays and all are welcome to come and talk bitcoin. If you are new, we have members who can help you level up your knowledge related to self-custody, lightning, mining and many other areas.

Follow us on Social Media (Twitter or Nostr) to keep the discussion going and weigh in on dates and locations for future meetups.

See you all there!

item.title: Western Mass Bitcoin Hangout #30
item.dc:creator: wmbm_btc
item.content:encoded:
WM Bitcoin Meetup: Northampton MA

This meetup will be at Fitzwilly's Restaurant in Northampton!

 

Event Details

For our 30th meetup, we will be having a social meetup have a reserved space at Fitzwilly's in Northampton. Thanks to Bitcoin Well we will also be having two free giveaways this month and one lucky attendee will win $25-$100 worth of bitcoin!

Agenda

This meetup is simply social, we have a reserved space in the back bar area; you can just ask where the bitcoin meetup is and they can point you in our direction. This is a great opportunity to come and learn why bitcoin continues to grow and thrive no matter how many times it is declared dead by the incumbent financial class.

About the Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup

The Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup is on a mission to find and connect bitcoiners in the area and has been growing quickly. We are interested in spreading education, increasing local merchant adoption and hanging out with bitcoiners. We meet once a month and all are welcome to come and talk bitcoin. If you are new, we have members who can help you level up your knowledge related to self-custody, lightning, mining and many other areas.

Stay Connected

  • Twitter: @MassBitcoin
  • Nostr: npub1ynn5qnnc95qaqjejrtyazfdgutlxvme3djywe6s9wg76k68s37sqsl2qfd
See You There!

Don’t miss out—this is a great opportunity to connect, learn, and grow with the Bitcoin community!

item.title: Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup #33
item.dc:creator: wmbm_btc
item.content:encoded:
WM Bitcoin Meetup: East Longmeadow

This meetup will be at Peppa’s Pizza in East Longmeadow!

Event Details

For our 33rd meetup we'll follow a Socratic Seminar format and cover news, bitcoin education, and talk about other relevant topics in bitcoin. Our meetup format is perfect for people brand new to bitcoin or for bitcoin experts. This meetup grows primarily through word of mouth, so tell your friends to join us!

The first 30 minutes will be for socializing (pizza and drinks available for purchase) then we will start with this month's topic(s). This is a great opportunity to come and learn why bitcoin continues to grow and thrive no matter how many times it is declared dead by the incumbent financial class.


About the Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup

The Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup is on a mission to find and connect bitcoiners in the area and has been growing quickly. We are interested in spreading education, increasing local merchant adoption and hanging out with bitcoiners. We meet once a month and all are welcome to come and talk bitcoin. If you are new, we have members who can help you level up your knowledge related to self-custody, lightning, mining and many other areas.

Stay Connected

Follow us to join the conversation and vote on future dates and locations:

    • Twitter: @MassBitcoin

    • Nostr: npub1ynn5qnnc95qaqjejrtyazfdgutlxvme3djywe6s9wg76k68s37sqsl2qfd

See You There!

Don’t miss out—this is a great opportunity to connect, learn, and grow with the Bitcoin community!
item.category: Peppas by The Slice , East Longmeadow, MA

WM Bitcoin Meetup: East Longmeadow

This meetup will be at Peppa’s Pizza in East Longmeadow!

Event Details

For our 34th meetup we'll follow a Socratic Seminar format and cover news, bitcoin education, and talk about other relevant topics in bitcoin. Our meetup format is perfect for people brand new to bitcoin or for bitcoin experts. This meetup grows primarily through word of mouth, so tell your friends to join us!

The first 30 minutes will be for socializing (pizza and drinks available for purchase) then we will start with this month's topic(s). This is a great opportunity to come and learn why bitcoin continues to grow and thrive no matter how many times it is declared dead by the incumbent financial class.

About the Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup

The Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup is on a mission to find and connect bitcoiners in the area and has been growing quickly. We are interested in spreading education, increasing local merchant adoption and hanging out with bitcoiners. We meet once a month and all are welcome to come and talk bitcoin. If you are new, we have members who can help you level up your knowledge related to self-custody, lightning, mining and many other areas.

Stay Connected

Follow us to join the conversation and vote on future dates and locations:

    • Twitter: @MassBitcoin

    • Nostr: npub1ynn5qnnc95qaqjejrtyazfdgutlxvme3djywe6s9wg76k68s37sqsl2qfd

See You There!

Don’t miss out—this is a great opportunity to connect, learn, and grow with the Bitcoin community!

item.title: Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup #35
item.dc:creator: wmbm_btc
item.content:encoded:
WM Beefsteak Meetup: Great Barrington

This meetup will be a Beefsteak in Great Barrington, MA!

Event Details

Our July meetup is an amazing opportunity to attend a cult classic bitcoiner event called a Beefsteak that will be hosted by local legend Awayslice. Awayslice is credited with bringing the beefsteak tradition to bitcoiners and has hosted some incredible beefsteaks associated with bitcoin conferences, meetups as well as standalone non-bitcoin centric events. Check out this clip if you’d like to hear him describe the origins of the beefsteak or listen this podcast to hear more about his background and the logistics of the event.  

Awayslice will be hosting a beefsteak event as our July meetup in the Great Barrington area on July 20th at 1pm; there are only a few tickets left, so if you are interested RSVP an I'll send you a link to get your ticket!

This meetup grows primarily through word of mouth, so tell your friends to join us!

 

About the Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup

The Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup is on a mission to find and connect bitcoiners in the area and has been growing quickly. We are interested in spreading education, increasing local merchant adoption and hanging out with bitcoiners. We meet once a month and all are welcome to come and talk bitcoin. If you are new, we have members who can help you level up your knowledge related to self-custody, lightning, mining and many other areas.

Stay Connected

Follow us to join the conversation and vote on future dates and locations:

    • Twitter: @MassBitcoin

    • Nostr: npub1ynn5qnnc95qaqjejrtyazfdgutlxvme3djywe6s9wg76k68s37sqsl2qfd

See You There!

Don’t miss out—this is a great opportunity to connect, learn, and grow with the Bitcoin community

item.title: Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup #38
item.dc:creator: wmbm_btc
item.content:encoded:
WM Bitcoin Regional Meetup: West Springfield

This meetup will be at The Dante Club in West Springfield!

Event Details

For our 38th meetup we'll be having a regional bitcoin meetup celebration in honor of our 3 year anniversary! We'll be inviting in members from the other area meetups and are planning a larger social event for local bitcoiners who maybe don't see each other as often as we would like. It's a great opportunity for folks who don't have time to make it out to our monthly meetup to have a larger social event to attend.

Come and enjoy some pizza provided by meetup donations as well as some of our charitable members. We'll have a private banquet hall at the Dante Club in West Springfield with our own bar with drinks available for purchase.

 

About the Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup

The Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup is on a mission to find and connect bitcoiners in the area and has been growing quickly. We are interested in spreading education, increasing local merchant adoption and hanging out with bitcoiners. We meet once a month and all are welcome to come and talk bitcoin. If you are new, we have members who can help you level up your knowledge related to self-custody, lightning, mining and many other areas.

Stay Connected

Follow us to join the conversation and vote on future dates and locations:

    • Twitter: @MassBitcoin

    • Nostr: npub1ynn5qnnc95qaqjejrtyazfdgutlxvme3djywe6s9wg76k68s37sqsl2qfd

See You There!

Don’t miss out—this is a great opportunity to connect, learn, and grow with the Bitcoin community!

WM Bitcoin Meetup: East Longmeadow

This meetup will be at Peppa’s Pizza in East Longmeadow!

Event Details

For our 43rd meetup we'll follow a Socratic Seminar format and cover news, bitcoin education, and talk about other relevant topics in bitcoin. Our meetup format is perfect for people brand new to bitcoin or for bitcoin experts. This meetup grows primarily through word of mouth, so tell your friends to join us!

The first 30 minutes will be for socializing (pizza and drinks available for purchase) then we will start with this month's topic(s). This is a great opportunity to come and learn why bitcoin continues to grow and thrive no matter how many times it is declared dead by the incumbent financial class.

 

About the Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup

The Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup is on a mission to find and connect bitcoiners in the area and has been growing quickly. We are interested in spreading education, increasing local merchant adoption and hanging out with bitcoiners. We meet once a month and all are welcome to come and talk bitcoin. If you are new, we have members who can help you level up your knowledge related to self-custody, lightning, mining and many other areas.

Stay Connected

Follow us to join the conversation and vote on future dates and locations:

    • Twitter: @MassBitcoin

    • Nostr: npub1ynn5qnnc95qaqjejrtyazfdgutlxvme3djywe6s9wg76k68s37sqsl2qfd

See You There!

Don’t miss out—this is a great opportunity to connect, learn, and grow with the Bitcoin community!

item.title: Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup #49
item.dc:creator: wmbm_btc
item.content:encoded:
WM Bitcoin Meetup: East Longmeadow

This meetup will be at Peppa’s Pizza in East Longmeadow!

Event Details

For our 49th meetup we'll follow a Socratic Seminar format and cover news, bitcoin education, and talk about other relevant topics in bitcoin. Our meetup format is perfect for people brand new to bitcoin or for bitcoin experts. This meetup grows primarily through word of mouth, so tell your friends to join us!

The first 30 minutes will be for socializing (pizza and drinks available for purchase) then we will start with this month's topic(s). This is a great opportunity to come and learn why bitcoin continues to grow and thrive no matter how many times it is declared dead by the incumbent financial class.

About the Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup

The Western Mass Bitcoin Meetup is on a mission to find and connect bitcoiners in the area and has been growing quickly. We are interested in spreading education, increasing local merchant adoption and hanging out with bitcoiners. We meet once a month and all are welcome to come and talk bitcoin. If you are new, we have members who can help you level up your knowledge related to self-custody, lightning, mining and many other areas.

Stay Connected

Follow us to join the conversation and vote on future dates and locations:

    • Twitter: @MassBitcoin

    • Nostr: npub1ynn5qnnc95qaqjejrtyazfdgutlxvme3djywe6s9wg76k68s37sqsl2qfd

See You There!

Don’t miss out—this is a great opportunity to connect, learn, and grow with the Bitcoin community!
